summary: Frontend-only testing completed for dedicated Match Page feature. All 12 features tested and working correctly. Navigation from homepage to /match/{match_id} works. Live cricket matches show all 8 market sections. Upcoming matches show 'Match has not started yet' message with basic odds only. Football matches show Draw option (3-way betting). Mobile responsive with bottom nav and bet slip modal.

issues: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors (<span> cannot be child of <tr>/<tbody>) - cosmetic issue from React dev tools, not affecting functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Match Page feature fully implemented and tested. Navigation from homepage to /match/{match_id} replaces the old modal dialog. Live cricket match ID: cc4cba06-3032-4b77-b1e0-f7d448108207. All market sections working for live cricket. Football matches show 3-way betting with Draw option.
